meaning: n.鐢熷懡鍛ㄦ湡,鐢熸椿鍛ㄦ湡
examples: How can you manage evolutionary versions of an Encyclopedia during the lifecycle of your architecture development?
Have you covered the entire lifecycle?
Companies will have different compensation strategies based on where they are in the business lifecycle.
Contracts must be managed over their entire lifecycle from their inception to anticipated termination or renewal.
